descriptions.text: Supermarket Simulator meets Farming Simulator—with zombies. Build your store, grow crops, and survive nightly undead attacks in this fast-paced farming defence game. Harvest, sell, and fight to keep your business and farm alive.

Supermarket Simulator meets Farming Simulator—with zombies. In this genre-blending simulator and survival game, you’ll build and manage your own supermarket by day, grow crops like a seasoned Farming Simulator pro, and defend your land from relentless zombie hordes after dark. Every cycle is a test of strategy and speed: stock shelves, optimize your farm layout, and prepare your defenses before the sun sets.

Farmfence is a strategic survival game where peaceful farming by day turns into desperate defense by night. Grow crops, manage resources, and build your homestead—then brace yourself as waves of undead swarm your fields after sunset. Can you harvest enough to survive the horrors of the night?

Blending farming simulation with tower defense mechanics, Farmfence challenges players to balance productivity and protection in a dynamic day-night cycle. Customize your farm layout, upgrade your defenses, and unlock new tools to withstand increasingly aggressive zombie raids.

Whether you're a casual builder or a tactical survivor, Farmfence offers a unique twist on the farming genre with fast-paced combat, strategic planning, and satisfying progression.

Key Features
Day-Night Gameplay Loop: Farm by day, defend by night—each cycle brings new challenges.
Crop Management: Plant, grow, and harvest a variety of crops to fuel your survival.
Zombie Defense: Build fences, turrets, and traps to protect your farm from nightly invasions.
Base Building: Design your farm layout for both efficiency and defense.
Upgrade System: Unlock new tools, structures, and abilities as you progress.
Strategic Depth: Balance resource allocation between farming and fortification.
